positive: A striking, stylized mountain range silhouette against a dramatic cosmic sunset backdrop. The composition must be centrally focused and symmetrical, designed for seamless repetition on apparel. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette: deep indigo blues, vibrant magentas, and warm burnt oranges. Incorporate subtle, clean geometric patterns and celestial elements (minimal constellations, nebulae dust) to enhance the psychedelic vaporwave aesthetic. The lighting should be dramatic backlighting, creating crisp, clean edges and strong silhouettes. Highly detailed linework, suitable for screen printing, vector art feel, high resolution.
negative: blur, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, signature, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, messy, photographic, realistic photography, grayscale, monochrome
